com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.cardreader

Class ExtCardReaderParameters

  • java.lang.Object
    • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.common.cardreader.CardReaderParameters
      • com.newland.nsdk.core.api.external.cardreader.ExtCardReaderParameters

  • public class ExtCardReaderParameters
extends CardReaderParameters
    Parameters used to searching cards.

    • Constructor Detail

      • ExtCardReaderParameters

        public ExtCardReaderParameters()

    • Method Detail

      • getPANKeyIndex

        public byte getPANKeyIndex()
        Gets PAN key index.
        Returns:
        PAN key index, indicates which key used to encrypt track data. The key shall already be exist in the external device.

      • setPANKeyIndex

        public void setPANKeyIndex(byte panKeyIndex)
        Sets PAN key index.
        Parameters:
        panKeyIndex - PAN key index, indicates which key used to encrypt track data. The key shall already be exist in the external device.

      • getCipherType

        public CipherType getCipherType()
        Gets cipher type.
        Returns:
        Cipher type, indicates how to encrypt track data. See CipherType.

      • setCipherType

        public void setCipherType(CipherType cipherType)
        Sets cipher type.
        Parameters:
        cipherType - Cipher type, indicates how to encrypt track data. See CipherType.

      • getIV

        public byte[] getIV()
        Gets IV.
        Returns:
        Initial value used for CBC mode.

      • setIV

        public void setIV(byte[] iv)
        Sets IV.
        Parameters:
        iv - Initial value used for CBC mode.

      • getTrackEncryptionType

        public byte getTrackEncryptionType()
        Gets track encryption type.
        Returns:
        Track encryption type.
        • 0: All encrypted.
        • 1: Union Pay

      • setTrackEncryptionType

        public void setTrackEncryptionType(byte trackEncryptionType)
        Sets track encryption type.
        Parameters:
        trackEncryptionType - Track encryption type.
        • 0: All encrypted.
        • 1: Union Pay

      • getDisplayMessages

        public java.lang.String[] getDisplayMessages()
        Gets display messages.
        Returns:
        Display messages which will be displayed in order(one string for one line). If null or empty, nothing will be displayed.

      • setDisplayMessages

        public void setDisplayMessages(java.lang.String[] displayMessages)
        Sets display messages.
        Parameters:
        displayMessages - Display messages which will be displayed in order(one string for one line). If null or empty, nothing will be displayed.

      • getFirstClearPANLen

        public byte getFirstClearPANLen()
        Gets the length of first clear part of masked PAN.
        Returns:
        The length of first clear part of masked PAN. Value range [0x06, 0x0A], default value is 0x06.

      • setFirstClearPANLen

        public void setFirstClearPANLen(byte firstClearPANLen)
        Sets the length of first clear part of masked PAN
        Parameters:
        firstClearPANLen - The length of first clear part of masked PAN. Value range [0x06, 0x0A], default value is 0x06.

      • getLastClearPANLen

        public byte getLastClearPANLen()
        Gets the length of last clear part of masked PAN.
        Returns:
        The length of last clear part of masked PAN. Value range [0x01, 0x04], default value is 0x04.

      • setLastClearPANLen

        public void setLastClearPANLen(byte lastClearPANLen)
        Sets the length of last clear part of masked PAN
        Parameters:
        lastClearPANLen - The length of last clear part of masked PAN. Value range [0x01, 0x04], default value is 0x04.
